title: nerium indicum var. odorum
intro: Nerium indicum var. odorum, also known as the blue oleander or yellow oleander, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a cardiac glycoside, which has been used to treat various heart conditions, including atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of Nerium indicum var. odorum include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it, as it can be toxic in large doses.
